title: cardamine glauca f. pumila
intro: Cardamine glauca f. pumila, also known as dwarf white bittercress or alpine bittercress, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Cardamine glauca f. pumila can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
